attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT WSE.FISCAL_MONTH_ID AS SHIP_FISCAL_MONTH_ID
          ,WSE.THEATER    AS SHIP_TO_THEATER
          ,'ALL_CTRY'         AS SHIP_TO_CTRY_CODE
          ,'DEPARTMENTAL'     AS REPORT_TYPE
          ,'ALL_FREIGHT_TYPE' AS FREIGHT_TYPE
          ,'ALL_PF'           AS PRODUCT_FAMILY
          ,'ALL_PID'          AS PROD_PART_NUMBER
          ,COALESCE((WSE.COST/COALESCE(NULLIF(WSRVF.PID_COUNT,
		0),1)),0) AS PID_COST
          ,COALESCE(WSE.COST,0) AS VOL_COST
          ,COALESCE(WSRVF.PID_COUNT,0) AS PID_COUNT
          ,COALESCE(WSRVF.PID_COUNT,0) AS VOL_MULTIPLIER
          ,COST                     AS THEATER_ER_COST
          ,COALESCE(WSRVF.PID_COUNT,0) AS THEATER_MULTIPLIER
      FROM ( 
SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID,THEATER,SUM(COST) COST
               FROM $$STGDB.WI_SSC_ER
              WHERE FISCAL_MONTH_ID IN (
SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID 
FROM	$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID)
                AND COST_TYPE IN ('Departmental - Theater', 'Departmental - Global SSC Ops',
		'Other')
              GROUP BY 1,2
            ) WSE
          ,( 
SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID,LOOKUP_THEATER
                   ,SUM(QUANTITY_SHIPPED) PID_COUNT
               FROM  $$STGDB.WI_SSC_RMA_VOLUME
              WHERE FISCAL_MONTH_ID IN (
SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID 
FROM	$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID)
              GROUP BY 1,2
            ) WSRVF
      WHERE WSE.THEATER = WSRVF.LOOKUP_THEATER

SELECT 
 SHIP_FISCAL_MONTH_ID
,SHIP_TO_THEATER
,SHIP_TO_CTRY_CODE
,REPORT_TYPE
,FREIGHT_TYPE
,PRODUCT_FAMILY
,PROD_PART_NUMBER
,PID_COST
,VOL_COST
,PID_COUNT
,VOL_MULTIPLIER
,THEATER_ER_COST
,THEATER_MULTIPLIER
,THEATER_ER_COST/ SUM(NEW_DEPRE)   OVER (PARTITION BY SHIP_TO_THEATER) AS NEW_DEPR_BY_THEATER
,NEW_DEPR_BY_THEATER*NEW_PID_COST AS NEW_DEPR_COST
FROM
(
SELECT ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.FISCAL_MONTH_ID AS SHIP_FISCAL_MONTH_ID
,ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.THEATER   AS SHIP_TO_THEATER
,'ALL_CTRY' AS SHIP_TO_CTRY_CODE
,'DEPRECIATION' AS REPORT_TYPE
,'ALL_FREIGHT_TYPE' AS FREIGHT_TYPE
,PF_MULTIPLIER_2.PRODUCT_FAMILY AS PRODUCT_FAMILY
,'ALL_PID' AS PROD_PART_NUMBER
,((PF_MULTIPLIER_2.PF_MULTIPLIER_COST * ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.DEPREC_COST) / COALESCE(NULLIF(ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.TOTAL_THEATER_MCOST,0),1))  / COALESCE(NULLIF(PF_MULTIPLIER_2.PID_COUNT,0),1) AS PID_COST
,((PF_MULTIPLIER_2.PF_MULTIPLIER_COST * ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.DEPREC_COST)/ COALESCE(NULLIF(ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.TOTAL_THEATER_MCOST,0),1))  AS VOL_COST
,COALESCE(PF_MULTIPLIER_2.PID_COUNT,0) AS PID_COUNT
,COALESCE(PF_MULTIPLIER_2.PF_MULTIPLIER_COST,0) AS VOL_MULTIPLIER
,ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.DEPREC_COST  AS THEATER_ER_COST
,ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.TOTAL_THEATER_MCOST    AS THEATER_MULTIPLIER
,(VOL_MULTIPLIER/PID_COUNT) AS NEW_BUY_24_MONTH_BY_PF
,NEW_BUY_24_MONTH_BY_PF/24 AS NEW_BUY_DEPRE_COST_BY_PF
,NEW_BUY_DEPRE_COST_BY_PF/SUM(PID_COUNT) OVER (PARTITION BY SHIP_FISCAL_MONTH_ID,PF_MULTIPLIER_2.PRODUCT_FAMILY)AS NEW_PID_COST
,NEW_PID_COST*PID_COUNT AS NEW_DEPRE
FROM (SELECT	WSE.FISCAL_MONTH_ID,WSE.THEATER,WSE.DEPREC_COST,WSRVF_X.TOTAL_THEATER_MCOST FROM (
SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID,THEATER, SUM(COST) DEPREC_COST
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SSC_ER  WHERE COST_TYPE IN ('SPARES INVENTORY DEPRECIATION')
AND FISCAL_MONTH_ID IN (SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID 
FROM	$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID)  GROUP BY 1,2
) WSE
INNER JOIN(SELECT	 WSRVF.LOOKUP_THEATER,SUM(COALESCE(WSDIS.TOTAL_NB_COST,0) * WSRVF.PID_COUNT)  TOTAL_THEATER_MCOST
FROM ( SELECT LOOKUP_THEATER,PRODUCT_FAMILY,SUM(QUANTITY_SHIPPED) PID_COUNT 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SSC_RMA_VOLUME WSRVF
WHERE FISCAL_MONTH_ID IN (SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID 
FROM	$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID) GROUP BY 1,2 
) WSRVF
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT	 PRODUCT_FAMILY, SUM(DEP_INV_COST) TOTAL_NB_COST
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SSC_DEP_INV_STACK WSDIS
WHERE (FISCAL_MONTH_ID >= (SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID-2 
FROM	$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID) 
AND FISCAL_MONTH_ID <= (SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID 
FROM	$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID))
 GROUP BY 1 ) WSDIS
ON WSRVF.PRODUCT_FAMILY = WSDIS.PRODUCT_FAMILY
GROUP BY WSRVF.LOOKUP_THEATER) WSRVF_X
ON WSE.THEATER = WSRVF_X.LOOKUP_THEATER
) ER_MULTIPLIER_COST
INNER JOIN (SELECT	WSRVF.LOOKUP_THEATER
,WSRVF.PRODUCT_FAMILY
,COALESCE(WSDIS.TOTAL_NB_COST,0) TOTAL_NB_COST
,WSRVF.PID_COUNT
,COALESCE(COALESCE(WSDIS.TOTAL_NB_COST,0) * WSRVF.PID_COUNT,0) PF_MULTIPLIER_COST
FROM (SELECT	LOOKUP_THEATER
,PRODUCT_FAMILY
,SUM(QUANTITY_SHIPPED) PID_COUNT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SSC_RMA_VOLUME
WHERE FISCAL_MONTH_ID IN (SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID 
FROM	$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID) GROUP BY LOOKUP_THEATER,PRODUCT_FAMILY
) WSRVF
LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT	PRODUCT_FAMILY,SUM(DEP_INV_COST) TOTAL_NB_COST FROM $$STGDB.WI_SSC_DEP_INV_STACK
WHERE (FISCAL_MONTH_ID >= (SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID-2 
FROM	$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID) 
AND FISCAL_MONTH_ID <= (SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID 
FROM	$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID))
GROUP BY PRODUCT_FAMILY ) WSDIS
ON WSRVF.PRODUCT_FAMILY = WSDIS.PRODUCT_FAMILY ) PF_MULTIPLIER_2
ON ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.THEATER = PF_MULTIPLIER_2.LOOKUP_THEATER
)AB

SELECT ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.FISCAL_MONTH_ID           AS SHIP_FISCAL_MONTH_ID
          ,ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.THEATER   AS SHIP_TO_THEATER
          ,'ALL_CTRY'                   AS SHIP_TO_CTRY_CODE
          ,'NET_REPAIR'                 AS REPORT_TYPE
          ,'ALL_FREIGHT_TYPE'           AS FREIGHT_TYPE
          ,'ALL_PF'                     AS PRODUCT_FAMILY
          ,PF_MULTIPLIER_2.PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER  AS PROD_PART_NUMBER
          ,((PF_MULTIPLIER_2.PART_MULTIPLIER_COST * ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.REPAIR_COST)/ COALESCE(NULLIF(ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.TOTAL_THEATER_MCOST,
		0),1))  / COALESCE(NULLIF(PF_MULTIPLIER_2.PID_COUNT,0),1) AS PID_COST
          ,((PF_MULTIPLIER_2.PART_MULTIPLIER_COST * ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.REPAIR_COST)/ COALESCE(NULLIF(ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.TOTAL_THEATER_MCOST,
		0),1))  AS VOL_COST
          ,COALESCE(PF_MULTIPLIER_2.PID_COUNT,0)            AS PID_COUNT
          ,COALESCE(PF_MULTIPLIER_2.PART_MULTIPLIER_COST,0) AS VOL_MULTIPLIER
          ,ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.REPAIR_COST              AS THEATER_ER_COST
          ,ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.TOTAL_THEATER_MCOST      AS THEATER_MULTIPLIER
      FROM (
SELECT	WSE.FISCAL_MONTH_ID,WSE.THEATER
                   ,WSE.REPAIR_COST
                   ,WSRVF_X.TOTAL_THEATER_MCOST
               FROM (
SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID,THEATER, SUM(COST) REPAIR_COST
                       FROM $$STGDB.WI_SSC_ER
                      WHERE COST_TYPE IN ('Net Repair')
                        AND FISCAL_MONTH_ID IN (
SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID 
FROM	$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID)
                      GROUP BY 1,2
                    ) WSE
               INNER JOIN 
			         (
SELECT	WSRVF.LOOKUP_THEATER
                           ,SUM(COALESCE(WSRO.PID_REPAIR_COST,
		0) * WSRVF.PID_COUNT)  TOTAL_THEATER_MCOST
                         FROM (
SELECT	LOOKUP_THEATER
                                    ,PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER
                                    ,SUM(QUANTITY_SHIPPED) AS PID_COUNT
                                FROM $$STGDB.WI_SSC_RMA_VOLUME
									WHERE FISCAL_MONTH_ID IN (
SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID 
FROM	$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID)
									GROUP BY LOOKUP_THEATER,PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER
                              ) WSRVF
						 LEFT OUTER JOIN
							 (
SELECT	ITEM AS PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER
                                    ,SUM(VALUE_1)/COALESCE(SUM(QUANTITY),
		1) AS PID_REPAIR_COST
                                FROM $$STGDB.WI_SSC_REPAIR_ORDER /* loaded ? */
                               WHERE (FISCAL_MONTH_ID >= (
SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID-2 
FROM	$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID) 
					   AND FISCAL_MONTH_ID <= (
SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID  
FROM	$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID))
                                 AND RECORD_TYPE = 'ItemRecord'
                               GROUP BY ITEM
                              ) WSRO
                           
                       ON WSRVF.PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER = WSRO.PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER
                       GROUP BY WSRVF.LOOKUP_THEATER
                    ) WSRVF_X
              ON WSE.THEATER = WSRVF_X.LOOKUP_THEATER
           ) ER_MULTIPLIER_COST
       INNER JOIN(
SELECT	WSRVF.LOOKUP_THEATER
							,WSRVF.PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER
							,COALESCE(WSRO.PID_REPAIR_COST,0) AS PID_REPAIR_COST
							,WSRVF.PID_COUNT AS PID_COUNT
							,COALESCE(COALESCE(WSRO.PID_REPAIR_COST,0) * WSRVF.PID_COUNT,
		0) PART_MULTIPLIER_COST
						FROM (
SELECT	LOOKUP_THEATER
									,PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER
									,SUM(QUANTITY_SHIPPED) PID_COUNT
								FROM $$STGDB.WI_SSC_RMA_VOLUME
									WHERE FISCAL_MONTH_ID IN (
SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID 
FROM	$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID)
									GROUP BY LOOKUP_THEATER,PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER
								) WSRVF
						LEFT OUTER JOIN 
							(
SELECT	ITEM AS PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER
									,SUM(VALUE_1)/COALESCE(SUM(QUANTITY),1) AS PID_REPAIR_COST
								FROM $$STGDB.WI_SSC_REPAIR_ORDER
									 WHERE (FISCAL_MONTH_ID >= (
SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID-2 
FROM	$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID) 
					   AND FISCAL_MONTH_ID <= (
SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID  
FROM	$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID))
									AND RECORD_TYPE = 'ItemRecord'
									GROUP BY ITEM
							) WSRO
						ON WSRVF.PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER = WSRO.PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER
					) PF_MULTIPLIER_2
     ON ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.THEATER = PF_MULTIPLIER_2.LOOKUP_THEATER

SELECT ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.FISCAL_MONTH_ID           AS SHIP_FISCAL_MONTH_ID
          ,ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.THEATER   AS SHIP_TO_THEATER
          ,PF_MULTIPLIER_2.SITE_COUNTRY AS SHIP_TO_CTRY_CODE
          ,'DUTY_VAT'                   AS REPORT_TYPE
          ,'ALL_FREIGHT_TYPE'           AS FREIGHT_TYPE
          ,'ALL_PF'                     AS PRODUCT_FAMILY
          ,PF_MULTIPLIER_2.PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER AS PROD_PART_NUMBER
          ,CAST(((COALESCE(PF_MULTIPLIER_2.PART_MULTIPLIER_COST,
		0) / COALESCE(NULLIF(ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.TOTAL_THEATER_MCOST,
		0),1)) * COALESCE(ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.DUTY_VAT_COST,0)) AS DECIMAL(38,
		9)) AS NUMR 
		  ,CAST(NUMR/COALESCE(NULLIF(PF_MULTIPLIER_2.PID_COUNT,0),1) AS DECIMAL(38,
		9)) AS PID_COST
          ,CAST(((COALESCE(PF_MULTIPLIER_2.PART_MULTIPLIER_COST,
		0) / COALESCE(NULLIF(ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.TOTAL_THEATER_MCOST,
		0),1)) * COALESCE(ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.DUTY_VAT_COST,0)) AS DECIMAL(38,
		9)) AS VOL_COST
          ,COALESCE(PF_MULTIPLIER_2.PID_COUNT,0)             AS PID_COUNT
          ,COALESCE(PF_MULTIPLIER_2.PART_MULTIPLIER_COST,0)  AS VOL_MULTIPLIER
          ,ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.DUTY_VAT_COST             AS THEATER_ER_COST
          ,ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.TOTAL_THEATER_MCOST       AS THEATER_MULTIPLIER
      FROM ( 
SELECT	WSE.FISCAL_MONTH_ID,WSE.THEATER
                   ,WSE.DUTY_VAT_COST
                   ,WSRVF_X.TOTAL_THEATER_MCOST
               FROM (
SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID,THEATER
                           ,SUM(COST) DUTY_VAT_COST
                       FROM $$STGDB.WI_SSC_ER
                      WHERE COST_TYPE IN ('Supplementary Data')
                        AND SUB_COST_TYPE IN ('VAT / Duty')
                        AND FISCAL_MONTH_ID IN (
SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID 
FROM	$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID)
                      GROUP BY 1,2
                    ) WSE
                   INNER JOIN(
SELECT	COALESCE(WDVBC.THEATER,WCT.THEATER) AS THEATER
                           ,SUM(  (WSRVF.CIV_RATE * WDVBC.EFFECTIVE_DUTY) + ( (WSRVF.CIV_RATE  + (WSRVF.CIV_RATE * WDVBC.EFFECTIVE_DUTY) )  * WDVBC.EFFECTIVE_VAT )   )  AS TOTAL_THEATER_MCOST
                       FROM (
SELECT	SITE_COUNTRY
                                    ,PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER
                                    ,SUM(QUANTITY_SHIPPED) AS PID_COUNT
                                    ,SUM(EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE) AS EXT_LIST_PRICE
                                    ,CAST(SUM(EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE *  CIV_RATE) AS DECIMAL(38,9)) AS CIV_RATE
                                FROM $$STGDB.WI_SSC_RMA_VOLUME RMA
				INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DUTY_VAT_BY_COUNTRY VAT
                                ON RMA.SITE_COUNTRY = VAT.COUNTRY_CODE
                               WHERE FISCAL_MONTH_ID IN (
SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID 
FROM	$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID)
                               GROUP BY SITE_COUNTRY,PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER
                             ) WSRVF
							 
                           INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_COUNTRY_THEATER WCT /* loaded ? */
						   ON WSRVF.SITE_COUNTRY = WCT.COUNTRY_CODE
                          LEFT OUTER JOIN(
SELECT	THEATER
											,COUNTRY_CODE
											,COALESCE((EFFECTIVE_DUTY/100),0) AS EFFECTIVE_DUTY
											,COALESCE((EFFECTIVE_VAT/100),0)  AS EFFECTIVE_VAT
										FROM $$STGDB.WI_DUTY_VAT_BY_COUNTRY
									) WDVBC
                       ON WSRVF.SITE_COUNTRY = WDVBC.COUNTRY_CODE
                         
                       GROUP BY COALESCE(WDVBC.THEATER,WCT.THEATER)
                    ) WSRVF_X
              ON WSE.THEATER = WSRVF_X.THEATER
           ) ER_MULTIPLIER_COST
    INNER JOIN (
SELECT	COALESCE(WDVBC.THEATER,WCT.THEATER) AS THEATER
                   ,WSRVF.SITE_COUNTRY
                   ,WSRVF.PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER
                   ,SUM(WSRVF.PID_COUNT) AS PID_COUNT
                   ,SUM(WSRVF.EXT_LIST_PRICE) AS EXT_LIST_PRICE
                ,SUM(  (WSRVF.CIV_RATE * WDVBC.EFFECTIVE_DUTY) + ( (WSRVF.CIV_RATE  + (WSRVF.CIV_RATE * WDVBC.EFFECTIVE_DUTY) )  * WDVBC.EFFECTIVE_VAT )   )  AS PART_MULTIPLIER_COST
               FROM (
SELECT	SITE_COUNTRY
                            ,PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER
                            ,SUM(QUANTITY_SHIPPED) AS PID_COUNT
                            ,SUM(EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE) AS EXT_LIST_PRICE
                            ,CAST(SUM(EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE * CIV_RATE) AS DECIMAL(38,9)) AS CIV_RATE
                        FROM $$STGDB.WI_SSC_RMA_VOLUME RMA
                        INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_DUTY_VAT_BY_COUNTRY VAT
                                ON RMA.SITE_COUNTRY = VAT.COUNTRY_CODE
                       WHERE FISCAL_MONTH_ID IN (
SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID 
FROM	$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID)
                       GROUP BY SITE_COUNTRY,PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER
                     ) WSRVF
                   INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CCM_COUNTRY_THEATER WCT
				   ON WSRVF.SITE_COUNTRY = WCT.COUNTRY_CODE
                   LEFT OUTER JOIN ( 
SELECT	THEATER
										,COUNTRY_CODE
										,COALESCE((EFFECTIVE_DUTY/100),0) AS EFFECTIVE_DUTY
										,COALESCE((EFFECTIVE_VAT/100),0)  AS EFFECTIVE_VAT
									FROM $$STGDB.WI_DUTY_VAT_BY_COUNTRY
									) WDVBC
					
                ON WSRVF.SITE_COUNTRY = WDVBC.COUNTRY_CODE 
                  
                GROUP BY COALESCE(WDVBC.THEATER,WCT.THEATER)
                     ,WSRVF.SITE_COUNTRY
                     ,WSRVF.PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER
           ) PF_MULTIPLIER_2
     ON ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.THEATER = PF_MULTIPLIER_2.THEATER

SELECT ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.FISCAL_MONTH_ID  AS SHIP_FISCAL_MONTH_ID
          ,ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.THEATER       AS SHIP_TO_THEATER
          ,PART_MULTIPLIER_2.SITE_COUNTRY   AS SHIP_TO_CTRY_CODE
          ,'TPL'                            AS REPORT_TYPE
          ,PART_MULTIPLIER_2.REQUESTED_SERVICE_GROUP AS FREIGHT_TYPE
          ,'ALL_PF'                         AS PRODUCT_FAMILY
          ,'ALL_PID'                        AS PROD_PART_NUMBER
          ,((PART_MULTIPLIER_2.SER_REQ_MULTIPLIER_COST * ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.TPL_COST)/COALESCE(NULLIF(ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.TOTAL_THEATER_MCOST ,
		0),1)) / COALESCE(NULLIF(PART_MULTIPLIER_2.PID_COUNT,0),1) AS PID_COST
          ,((PART_MULTIPLIER_2.SER_REQ_MULTIPLIER_COST * ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.TPL_COST)/COALESCE(NULLIF(ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.TOTAL_THEATER_MCOST ,
		0),1))  AS VOL_COST
          ,COALESCE(PART_MULTIPLIER_2.PID_COUNT,0) AS PID_COUNT
          ,COALESCE(PART_MULTIPLIER_2.SER_REQ_MULTIPLIER_COST,
		0) AS VOL_MULTIPLIER
          ,COALESCE(ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.TPL_COST,0)               AS THEATER_ER_COST
          ,COALESCE(ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.TOTAL_THEATER_MCOST,0)    AS THEATER_MULTIPLIER
      FROM ( 
SELECT	ER_TPL.FISCAL_MONTH_ID,ER_TPL.THEATER
                   ,ER_TPL.TPL_COST
                   ,TOTAL_THEATER_MULTIPLIER_COST.TOTAL_THEATER_MCOST
               FROM (
SELECT	TPL.FISCAL_MONTH_ID,TPL.THEATER
                           ,(TPL.COST - COALESCE(VAT.COST,0)) AS TPL_COST
                       FROM (
SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID,THEATER
                                   ,SUM(COST) COST
                               FROM $$STGDB.WI_SSC_ER
                              WHERE COST_TYPE IN ('TPL')
                                AND SUB_COST_TYPE IS NULL
                                AND FISCAL_MONTH_ID IN (
SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID 
FROM	$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID)
                              GROUP BY 1,2
                            ) TPL
                           INNER JOIN(
SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID,THEATER
                                   ,SUM(COST) AS COST
                               FROM $$STGDB.WI_SSC_ER
                              WHERE COST_TYPE IN ('Supplementary Data')
                                AND SUB_COST_TYPE IN ('VAT / Duty')
                                AND FISCAL_MONTH_ID IN (
SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID 
FROM	$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID)
                              GROUP BY 1,2
                            ) VAT
                      ON TPL.THEATER = VAT.THEATER
                    ) ER_TPL
                  INNER JOIN(
SELECT	THEATER,SUM(SER_REQ_MULTIPLIER_COST) TOTAL_THEATER_MCOST
                       FROM ( 
SELECT	THEATER
                                    ,REQUESTED_SERVICE_GROUP
                                    ,SUM(PID_COUNT) AS PID_COUNT
                                    ,SUM(SER_REQ_MULTIPLIER_COST) AS SER_REQ_MULTIPLIER_COST
                                FROM ( 
SELECT	COALESCE(WFWM.THEATER,WCT.THEATER) AS THEATER
                                             ,WSRVF.SITE_COUNTRY
                                             ,WSRVF.REQUESTED_SERVICE_GROUP
                                             ,PID_COUNT
                                             ,(WSRVF.PID_COUNT * WFWM.MULTIPLIER) AS SER_REQ_MULTIPLIER_COST
                                        FROM ( 
SELECT	SITE_COUNTRY
                                                     ,REQUESTED_SERVICE_GROUP
                                                     ,SUM(QUANTITY_SHIPPED) AS PID_COUNT
                                                 FROM $$STGDB.WI_SSC_RMA_VOLUME
                                                WHERE FISCAL_MONTH_ID IN (
SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID 
FROM	$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID)
                                                GROUP BY SITE_COUNTRY,REQUESTED_SERVICE_GROUP
                                             ) WSRVF
                                            LEFT OUTER JOIN( 
SELECT	THEATER
                                                     ,COUNTRY_CODE
                                                     ,SERVICE_REQUEST
                                                     ,COALESCE(MULTIPLIER,
		0) AS MULTIPLIER
                                                 FROM $$STGDB.WI_FREIGHT_WH_MULTIPLIER /* loaded ? */
                                               ) WFWM
											   ON WSRVF.SITE_COUNTRY = WFWM.COUNTRY_CODE
                                         AND WSRVF.REQUESTED_SERVICE_GROUP = WFWM.SERVICE_REQUEST
                                            INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_COUNTRY_THEATER WCT
                                               ON WSRVF.SITE_COUNTRY = WCT.COUNTRY_CODE
                                     ) B
                               GROUP BY THEATER, REQUESTED_SERVICE_GROUP
                            ) PART_MULTIPLIER_1
                        GROUP BY THEATER
                    ) TOTAL_THEATER_MULTIPLIER_COST
              ON ER_TPL.THEATER= TOTAL_THEATER_MULTIPLIER_COST.THEATER
           ) ER_MULTIPLIER_COST
INNER JOIN (
SELECT	THEATER
                   ,SITE_COUNTRY
                   ,REQUESTED_SERVICE_GROUP
                   ,SUM(PID_COUNT) AS PID_COUNT
                   ,SUM(SER_REQ_MULTIPLIER_COST) AS SER_REQ_MULTIPLIER_COST
               FROM (
SELECT	COALESCE(WFWM.THEATER,WCT.THEATER) AS THEATER
                            ,WSRVF.SITE_COUNTRY
                            ,WSRVF.REQUESTED_SERVICE_GROUP
                            ,PID_COUNT
                            ,(WSRVF.PID_COUNT * WFWM.MULTIPLIER) AS SER_REQ_MULTIPLIER_COST
                        FROM ( 
SELECT	SITE_COUNTRY
                                     ,REQUESTED_SERVICE_GROUP
                                     ,SUM(QUANTITY_SHIPPED) AS PID_COUNT
                                 FROM $$STGDB.WI_SSC_RMA_VOLUME
                                WHERE FISCAL_MONTH_ID IN (
SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID 
FROM	$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID)
                                GROUP BY SITE_COUNTRY,REQUESTED_SERVICE_GROUP
                             ) WSRVF
                            LEFT OUTER JOIN(
SELECT	THEATER
												,COUNTRY_CODE
												,SERVICE_REQUEST
												,COALESCE(MULTIPLIER,0) AS MULTIPLIER
											FROM $$STGDB.WI_FREIGHT_WH_MULTIPLIER
										) WFWM
                           	
								ON WSRVF.SITE_COUNTRY = WFWM.COUNTRY_CODE
								AND WSRVF.REQUESTED_SERVICE_GROUP = WFWM.SERVICE_REQUEST
							INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_COUNTRY_THEATER WCT
                           ON WSRVF.SITE_COUNTRY = WCT.COUNTRY_CODE) A
              GROUP BY THEATER, SITE_COUNTRY, REQUESTED_SERVICE_GROUP
           ) PART_MULTIPLIER_2
      ON ER_MULTIPLIER_COST.THEATER = PART_MULTIPLIER_2.THEATER

SELECT	WSE.FISCAL_MONTH_ID AS SHIP_FISCAL_MONTH_ID
          ,WSE.THEATER    AS SHIP_TO_THEATER
          ,'ALL_CTRY'         AS SHIP_TO_CTRY_CODE
          ,'TPM'              AS REPORT_TYPE
          ,'ALL_FREIGHT_TYPE' AS FREIGHT_TYPE
          ,'ALL_PF'           AS PRODUCT_FAMILY
          ,'ALL_PID'          AS PROD_PART_NUMBER
          ,COALESCE((WSE.COST/COALESCE(NULLIF(WSRVF.PID_COUNT,
		0),1)),0) AS PID_COST
          ,COALESCE(WSE.COST,0) AS VOL_COST
          ,COALESCE(WSRVF.PID_COUNT,0) AS PID_COUNT
          ,COALESCE(WSRVF.PID_COUNT,0) AS VOL_MULTIPLIER
          ,COST                     AS THEATER_ER_COST
          ,COALESCE(WSRVF.PID_COUNT,0) AS THEATER_MULTIPLIER
      FROM ( 
SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID,THEATER,SUM(COST) COST
               FROM $$STGDB.WI_SSC_ER
              WHERE FISCAL_MONTH_ID IN (
SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID 
FROM	$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID)
                AND COST_TYPE IN ('TPM')
                AND SUB_COST_TYPE IS NULL
              GROUP BY 1,2
            ) WSE
          INNER JOIN( 
SELECT	LOOKUP_THEATER
                   ,SUM(QUANTITY_SHIPPED) PID_COUNT
               FROM $$STGDB.WI_SSC_RMA_VOLUME
              WHERE FISCAL_MONTH_ID IN (
SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID 
FROM	$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID) AND LABOR_LINE_FLAG = 'Y' 
              GROUP BY LOOKUP_THEATER
            ) WSRVF
      ON WSE.THEATER = WSRVF.LOOKUP_THEATER

SELECT	WSE.FISCAL_MONTH_ID AS SHIP_FISCAL_MONTH_ID
          ,WSE.THEATER    AS SHIP_TO_THEATER
          ,'ALL_CTRY'         AS SHIP_TO_CTRY_CODE
          ,'OEM'              AS REPORT_TYPE
          ,'ALL_FREIGHT_TYPE' AS FREIGHT_TYPE
          ,'ALL_PF'           AS PRODUCT_FAMILY
          ,'ALL_PID'          AS PROD_PART_NUMBER
          ,COALESCE((WSE.COST/COALESCE(NULLIF(WSRVF.PID_COUNT,
		0),1)),0) AS PID_COST
          ,COALESCE(WSE.COST,0) AS VOL_COST
          ,COALESCE(WSRVF.PID_COUNT,0) AS PID_COUNT
          ,COALESCE(WSRVF.PID_COUNT,0) AS VOL_MULTIPLIER
          ,COST                     AS THEATER_ER_COST
          ,COALESCE(WSRVF.PID_COUNT,0) AS THEATER_MULTIPLIER
      FROM ( 
SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID,THEATER,SUM(COST) COST
               FROM $$STGDB.WI_SSC_ER
              WHERE FISCAL_MONTH_ID IN (
SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID 
FROM	$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID)
                AND COST_TYPE IN ('OEM')
                AND SUB_COST_TYPE IS NULL
              GROUP BY 1,2
            ) WSE
          INNER JOIN( 
SELECT	LOOKUP_THEATER
                   ,SUM(QUANTITY_SHIPPED) PID_COUNT
               FROM $$STGDB.WI_SSC_RMA_VOLUME
              WHERE FISCAL_MONTH_ID IN (
SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID 
FROM	$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID) AND LABOR_LINE_FLAG = 'Y' 
              GROUP BY LOOKUP_THEATER
            ) WSRVF
      ON WSE.THEATER = WSRVF.LOOKUP_THEATER

SELECT EVF.SR_NUMBER
          ,EVF.EXT_THEATER_NAME AS THEATER
          ,EVF.EXT_DELIVERY_CHANNEL AS DELIVERY_CHANNEL
          ,COALESCE(NULLIF (EVF.COMPLEXITY_ID, -1), 0) AS COMPLEXITY_ID
          ,EVF.CUSTOMER
          ,EVF.CONTRACT
          ,EVF.HW_FAMILY
          ,
CASE	WHEN EVF.MARKET_SEGMENT = 'UNKNOWN' 
		        THEN 'UNKNOWN CUSTOMER MARKET SEGMENT'
				ELSE UPPER(EVF.MARKET_SEGMENT)
				END AS MARKET_SEGMENT
--				DECODE (TWFM012.MARKET_SEGMENT,'UNKNOWN', 'UNKNOWN CUSTOMER MARKET SEGMENT',UPPER (TWFM012.MARKET_SEGMENT)) AS MARKET_SEGMENT
          ,EVF.CLOSE_DATE
          ,EVF.SA_NUMBER
          ,EVF.UPDATED_COT_TECH_KEY
          ,'N/A' AS TECHNOLOGY
          ,'N/A' AS FORMER_TECHNOLOGY
          ,WIC.ID AS ACOD
      FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_VOLUME_FACT EVF
      INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ACOD_CLASSIFICATION  WIC
     ON EVF.FISCAL_MONTH_ID  IN (
SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID 
FROM	$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID)
       AND EVF.CLOSE_DATE IS NOT NULL
       AND COALESCE(EVF.ACOD_FINANCE_ACCRUED,0) BETWEEN WIC.MIN_ACOD AND WIC.MAX_ACOD

SELECT RMA_VOL.SR_NUMBER
          ,RMA_VOL.ORDER_NUMBER
          ,RMA_VOL.PRODUCT_FAMILY
          ,RMA_VOL.FISCAL_SHIP_QUARTER
          ,RMA_VOL.EXTENDED_STANDARD_COST
          ,RMA_VOL.SITE_COUNTRY
          ,RMA_VOL.SITE_THEATER
          ,RMA_VOL.ORDER_SA_NUMBER
          ,RMA_VOL.ORDER_SA_SERVICE_LINE
          ,RMA_VOL.PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER
          ,RMA_VOL.CONTRACTED_SERVICE_GROUP
          ,RMA_VOL.QUANTITY_SHIPPED
          ,RMA_VOL.REQUESTED_SERVICE_GROUP
          ,RMA_VOL.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE
          ,RMA_VOL.SHIP_FISCAL_MONTH
          ,RMA_VOL.SR_TYPE
          ,RMA_VOL.FISCAL_MONTH_ID
          ,RMA_VOL.LOOKUP_THEATER
          ,(COALESCE(DEPT_COST.PID_COST,0) * COALESCE(QUANTITY_SHIPPED,		0)) DEPT_COST
          ,(COALESCE(DEPREC_COST.PID_COST,0) * COALESCE(QUANTITY_SHIPPED,		0)) DEPREC_COST
          ,(COALESCE(REPAIR_COST.PID_COST,0) * COALESCE(QUANTITY_SHIPPED,		0)) REPAIR_COST
          ,(COALESCE(VAT_COST.PID_COST,0) * COALESCE(QUANTITY_SHIPPED,		0)) VAT_COST
          ,(COALESCE(WI_TPL_COST.PID_COST,0) * COALESCE(QUANTITY_SHIPPED,		0)) WI_TPL_COST
          ,CASE WHEN RMA_VOL.LABOR_LINE_FLAG = 'Y' THEN (COALESCE(TPM_COST.PID_COST,0) * COALESCE(QUANTITY_SHIPPED,0)) ELSE 0 END AS TPM_COST
          ,CASE WHEN RMA_VOL.LABOR_LINE_FLAG = 'Y' THEN (COALESCE(OEM_COST.PID_COST,0) * COALESCE(QUANTITY_SHIPPED,0)) ELSE 0 END AS OEM_COST
          ,COALESCE(WSF.DELIVERY_CHANNEL,'Online SVO') DELIVERY_CHANNEL
          ,COALESCE(WSF.TECHNOLOGY,'Hardware') TECHNOLOGY
          ,COALESCE(WSF.COMPLEXITY_ID,0) COMPLEXITY
          ,COALESCE(RMA_VOL.SITE_CUST_NAME,WSF.CUSTOMER,'Online SVO') CUSTOMER
          ,COALESCE(WSF.CONTRACT,'Online SVO') CONTRACT
          ,COALESCE(WSF.HW_FAMILY,'N/A') HW_FAMILY
          ,CASE	WHEN RMA_VOL.CUST_MKT_SEGMENT IS NULL	THEN COALESCE(CASE	WHEN WSF.MARKET_SEGMENT = 'UNKNOWN' THEN 'UNKNOWN CUSTOMER MARKET SEGMENT' ELSE WSF.MARKET_SEGMENT END	,'UNKNOWN CUSTOMER MARKET SEGMENT')	ELSE RMA_VOL.CUST_MKT_SEGMENT END AS MARKET_SEGMENT
          ,COALESCE(WSF.ACOD,0) ACOD
          ,COALESCE(WSF.CLOSE_DATE,NULL) AS CLOSED_DATE
          ,NULL AS TAC_ACTIVITY_DC
          ,RMA_VOL.SR_NUMBER AS FIN_SR_NUMBER
          ,NULL AS FIN_THEATER
          ,NULL AS FIN_DC
          ,NULL AS TAC_ACT_THEATER
          ,NULL AS TAC_ACT_DC                    
          ,COALESCE(WSF.TECHNOLOGY,'Hardware') NAM_TECHNOLOGY
          ,COALESCE(WSF.FORMER_TECHNOLOGY, 'Hardware') FORMER_TECHNOLOGY
          ,CAST(RMA_VOL.CREATED_DATE AS VARCHAR(40)) AS  CREATED_DATE
          ,NULL AS TSPC_ID
          ,COALESCE(WSF.COMPLEXITY_ID,0) CURR_COMPLEXITY
          ,COALESCE(RMA_VOL.SITE_CUST_NAME,WSF.CUSTOMER,'Online SVO') CURR_CUSTOMER
           ,COALESCE(WSF.CONTRACT,'Online SVO') CURR_CONTRACT
          ,COALESCE(WSF.HW_FAMILY,'N/A') CURR_HW_FAMILY
          ,CASE	WHEN RMA_VOL.CUST_MKT_SEGMENT IS NULL THEN COALESCE(CASE	WHEN WSF.MARKET_SEGMENT = 'UNKNOWN' THEN 'UNKNOWN CUSTOMER MARKET SEGMENT' ELSE WSF.MARKET_SEGMENT END	,'UNKNOWN CUSTOMER MARKET SEGMENT')	ELSE RMA_VOL.CUST_MKT_SEGMENT END AS CURR_MARKET_SEGMENT
          ,COALESCE(WSF.ACOD,0) CURR_ACOD
          ,COALESCE(WSF.TECHNOLOGY,'Hardware') CURR_NAM_TECHNOLOGY
          ,COALESCE(WSF.FORMER_TECHNOLOGY, 'Hardware') CURR_FORMER_TECHNOLOGY
          ,COALESCE(NULLIF(UPPER(WSF.SA_NUMBER),'NOT AVAILABLE'),RMA_VOL.ORDER_SA_NUMBER) SA_NUMBER
          ,COALESCE(NULLIF(UPPER(WSF.SA_NUMBER),'NOT AVAILABLE'),RMA_VOL.ORDER_SA_NUMBER) CURR_SA_NUMBER
          ,'0' as FAILURE_CODE
		  ,'0' AS WARRANTY_PARTS_PCT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SSC_RMA_VOLUME RMA_VOL
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_SSC_UNIT_COST DEPT_COST
ON RMA_VOL.FISCAL_MONTH_ID = DEPT_COST.SHIP_FISCAL_MONTH_ID 
AND RMA_VOL.LOOKUP_THEATER=DEPT_COST.SHIP_TO_THEATER
AND DEPT_COST.REPORT_TYPE ='DEPARTMENTAL'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_SSC_UNIT_COST DEPREC_COST
ON RMA_VOL.FISCAL_MONTH_ID = DEPREC_COST.SHIP_FISCAL_MONTH_ID 
AND RMA_VOL.LOOKUP_THEATER=DEPREC_COST.SHIP_TO_THEATER
AND RMA_VOL.PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER=DEPREC_COST.PROD_PART_NUMBER 
AND DEPREC_COST.REPORT_TYPE ='DEPRECIATION'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_SSC_UNIT_COST REPAIR_COST
ON RMA_VOL.FISCAL_MONTH_ID = REPAIR_COST.SHIP_FISCAL_MONTH_ID
AND RMA_VOL.LOOKUP_THEATER=REPAIR_COST.SHIP_TO_THEATER
AND RMA_VOL.PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER=REPAIR_COST.PROD_PART_NUMBER
AND REPAIR_COST.REPORT_TYPE='NET_REPAIR'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_SSC_UNIT_COST VAT_COST
ON RMA_VOL.FISCAL_MONTH_ID = VAT_COST.SHIP_FISCAL_MONTH_ID
AND RMA_VOL.LOOKUP_THEATER=VAT_COST.SHIP_TO_THEATER
AND RMA_VOL.SITE_COUNTRY=VAT_COST.SHIP_TO_CTRY_CODE
AND RMA_VOL.PRODUCT_PART_NUMBER=VAT_COST.PROD_PART_NUMBER
AND VAT_COST.REPORT_TYPE ='DUTY_VAT'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_SSC_UNIT_COST WI_TPL_COST
ON RMA_VOL.FISCAL_MONTH_ID = WI_TPL_COST.SHIP_FISCAL_MONTH_ID
AND RMA_VOL.LOOKUP_THEATER=WI_TPL_COST.SHIP_TO_THEATER
AND RMA_VOL.SITE_COUNTRY=WI_TPL_COST.SHIP_TO_CTRY_CODE
AND RMA_VOL.REQUESTED_SERVICE_GROUP=WI_TPL_COST.FREIGHT_TYPE 
AND WI_TPL_COST.REPORT_TYPE ='TPL'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_SSC_UNIT_COST TPM_COST
ON RMA_VOL.FISCAL_MONTH_ID = TPM_COST.SHIP_FISCAL_MONTH_ID 
AND RMA_VOL.LOOKUP_THEATER=TPM_COST.SHIP_TO_THEATER
AND TPM_COST.REPORT_TYPE ='TPM'
LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.WI_SSC_UNIT_COST OEM_COST
ON RMA_VOL.FISCAL_MONTH_ID = OEM_COST.SHIP_FISCAL_MONTH_ID
AND RMA_VOL.LOOKUP_THEATER=OEM_COST.SHIP_TO_THEATER
AND OEM_COST.REPORT_TYPE ='OEM'
LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_SR_FACT  WSF
ON WSF.SR_NUMBER = RMA_VOL.SR_NUMBER
WHERE	RMA_VOL.FISCAL_MONTH_ID IN (SELECT	FISCAL_MONTH_ID FROM	$$STGDB.WI_TSS_COST_CNTRL_MONTH_ID)
